description: LLM evaluation and quality assurance framework. Load when working on testing AI outputs, building judge prompts, or aligning model behavior.
virtuous_cycle: 1. evaluation-quality: systematic measurements via assertions, HITL reviews, alignment metrics
2. debugging-traceability: Langfuse traces to diagnose failure origin (retrieval, logic, or prompting)
3. behavior-change: iterative refinement — failures converted into permanent improvements

reference_based.description: Used when a golden answer exists — automate as Level 1 unit tests.

reference_free.description: Used for subjective quality — requires Level 2 judgment.

metric_selection.binary_first_mandate: Use Pass/Fail before scalar scores. Scalar scores introduce noise and make Human-Model Agreement impossible to calculate.

llm_as_judge.description: Use a high-performing model to automate critique. The judge must be more capable than the generator.
llm_as_judge.recommended_models: GPT-4, Claude Sonnet 4.6+ — always use the most powerful available
validation_workflow: 1. prediction-collection: gather outputs from real or synthetic data
3. human-evaluation: domain expert evaluates same data independently
4. judgment-comparison: identify discrepancies between Judge and Human
5. evaluator-iteration: refine Judge instructions based on gaps

judge_prompt_requirements.dimensions: define Accuracy, Helpfulness, Tone as separate evaluation axes
judge_prompt_requirements.chain_of_thought: mandate CoT reasoning before score — reasoning first, then binary 1/0
judge_prompt_requirements.structured_output: judge returns JSON/Pydantic-validated output — never free-text scores

hitl_alignment_protocol.description: Domain experts provide the gold standard. Human is always the ultimate authority.

agreement_matrix.rule: If alignment score is 0, the human is always right — fix the Judge prompt.

meta_prompting.description: Feed discrepancies into a high-level model to identify patterns in human critique.
meta_prompting.purpose: Automatically suggest refinements to the Judge's system prompt.
meta_prompting.result: Feedback loop that mathematically aligns the evaluator with expert intuition.

failure_mode_collection.raw_events: Capture exact JSON flowing through the system. Every production failure → Level 1 unit test.
failure_mode_collection.principle: Fix locally, redeploy, same failure never recurs.
failure_mode_collection.manual_inspection: Highest value-to-prestige ratio in AI engineering. Even at Zapier, Principal Engineers spend 3 hours daily looking at traces.

key_principles: Start simple: master binary Pass/Fail before complex scoring.
Build domain-specific: evaluations must reflect specific business logic, not generic metrics.
Remove friction: viewing, labeling, analyzing data must be effortless.
Iterate systematically: feedback loops ensure improvements compound.
